equipment: DWZ-808 全自动电脑剥线机

skill.title: Trial Cut - Adjust Cutter Depth
skill.purpose: Verify data and fine-tune cutter depth to ensure proper strip depth
skill.when: After entering a new program, changing wire, or during first trial cut
operations: Press Run button to cut one piece
Check both ends of the cut wire for scoring but not stripped
Press Cutter Depth key and increase the value (e.g., from 140 to 146)
Press Run button again to trial cut
skill.success_check: Stripped ends clean, no scratches, no un-stripped areas
common_mistakes: Forgetting to press Stop before adjusting parameters
Increasing cutter depth too much, damaging the conductor
Adjusting too large a step and overshooting the optimal value
key_values: Cutter depth 140: current parameter, unit 0.01 mm
Cutter depth 146: increased parameter, deeper strip depth
skill.warning: Do not increase cutter depth too much at once to avoid cutting copper strands; always stop the machine before changing parameters

skill.title: Adjust Cutter Depth to Prevent Core Breakage
skill.purpose: Adjust the cutter depth value to prevent cutting internal copper wires during stripping.
skill.when: When copper wires are found broken at the front strip after stripping.
operations: Check copper wire condition on both half-strip and full-strip ends.
Press the cutter depth key to access the parameter.
Decrease the current cutter depth value.
Press the confirm key to save the new value.
skill.success_check: After stripping again, no copper wires are broken, and the insulation is cut cleanly.
common_mistakes: Adjusted only one side and forgot the other.
Pressed a key but did not press confirm to save.
Increased the value too much, causing more breakage.
key_values: Adjusted cutter depth: 144 or 143 (suitable value without breaking copper wires)
skill.warning: Always press confirm after each adjustment, otherwise the parameter will not take effect and wire breakage may occur immediately.
